title: Pholidia phillipsii
taxonomy: Pholidia phillipsii is classified within the family Diaporthaceae, which belongs to the order Diaporthales. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its position within the fungal taxonomy. Pholidia phillipsii is a type of fungus, specifically a species of ascomycete. The family Diaporthaceae is a group of fungi that are mostly saprotrophic, meaning they obtain nutrients by decomposing organic matter.
